data.name: ButtonHelp
data.value: Connect to your CISO Assistant GRC data

data.name: KeyLabel
data.value: Personal Access Token (create one from your CISO Assistant profile page)

data.name: BaseUrlDescription
data.value: The address you use to open CISO Assistant in your browser, e.g. https://ciso-assistant.example.com

data.name: ContentsLongDescription
data.value: Returns the CISO Assistant reporting tables: facts, dimensions and bridge tables, scoped to what your account is allowed to see.

data.name: ErrorInsecureUrl
data.value: For security, plain http:// URLs are only allowed for local or private development hosts. Enter the https:// address of your CISO Assistant instance.

data.name: ErrorAuth
data.value: CISO Assistant rejected your Personal Access Token. It may be expired or revoked: create a new token from your profile page, then update the credentials in Power BI (Data source settings).

data.name: ErrorNotFound
data.value: The CISO Assistant API endpoint was not found. Check the CISO Assistant URL, and that the server version supports the Power BI connector.

data.name: ErrorRateLimit
data.value: The CISO Assistant API rate limit was reached. Wait a moment and refresh again.

data.name: ErrorServer
data.value: CISO Assistant returned a server error (HTTP #{0}). Try again later or contact your administrator.

data.name: ErrorGeneric
data.value: CISO Assistant returned an unexpected error (HTTP #{0}).
